I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user is asking how to filter tests by the "Integration" category when running `dotnet test`. Let me check their test file to see how categories are defined.

data.content:
Your tests use MSTest's `[TestCategory("Integration")]` attribute. Use the `--filter` option:

```bash
dotnet test --filter TestCategory=Integration
```

This will run only `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase` and `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`.
